validators.detail:
error: current package believes it's in a workspace when it's not:
current:   /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/benchmark_runs/live_model/live-qwen14b-20260422/workspaces/bug_fix_from_failing_test/Cargo.toml
workspace: /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/Cargo.toml

this may be fixable by adding `benchmark_runs/live_model/live-qwen14b-20260422/workspaces/bug_fix_from_failing_test` to the `workspace.members` array of the manifest located at: /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/Cargo.toml
Alternatively, to keep it out of the workspace, add the package to the `workspace.exclude` array, or add an empty `[workspace]` table to the package's manifest.
